titleStmt.title: SII 23.233: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 233. (A.R. No. 233 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This seems to be part of a bigger inscription, evidently No. 234 of which the beginning is lost. Being also damaged the sequence is not clear after the first six lines. This portion records an endowment of one vēli of land (evidently by royal order) for the maintenance of a musician by name Eḻupaṇaidēvaṉ and his descendents for their service of singing the dēśi songs before the deity while holding the tiruvōlakkam (levee) as part of the services in the temple. The officer Madhurāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷār mentioned here figures also in No. 219 above, which has been assigned to king Uttama-Chōla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭaiyār śrīkāryam Atikārikaḷ maturāntaka muventaveḷārum tiru viṭaimarutuṭaiyār tevaka—
sabhai nampirāṭṭiyār gomu yārkkāy tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyārk kku kaṇkāṇi kaṇakku Uṭaiyanampi na—
mpiyalu yār koyilil kkūṭattey Iruntu Uṭaiyār tiruvolak kamāy Irukkat teciypāṭṭum kāśyapaṉ kaṇṭa —
naḻupaṇaitevanukku Ivaṉ teciy pāṭa teciy pāṭuvataṟku muṉ kal veṭṭiṉa nilam Ivaṉ Eḻupaṇai tevaṉukkum Ivaṉ Anvayattārk kum
vaḻivaḻi candrādittaval Ivanukku veli nilam nivantam ceytu kuṭukka veṉṟu Evalāl Ivaṉukku nivantañ ceyta nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tevaka—
ṉmi veṇṇāṭu ṅkuṭic coṟuṭaiyāṉpattu Uḷḷiṭṭa veliyum Innilam veliyum Ivaṉātal Ivaṉ Anvayattār Ātal Oruvaṉey teciya pāṭiyu—
The following two lines do not seem to give sequence to the above though engraved in continuation. Probably they are part of No. 234.

nalluḻān koṇṭa munṟumāvum ṉaiccu kura lum nāṉ vilai koṇṭa Iruvelicceyyum tiruviṭaimarutil śrīmūlasthā—
Ivvūr nān Eṭuppitta śrīkoyilkaḷukku kuṭutten
Digital edition of SII 23.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
